deploy_simulation.without_resolve: migrate deploy would attempt baseline DDL → duplicate object errors on shared Neon (CREATE TABLE)
deploy_simulation.with_resolve_only: after resolve --applied, deploy is no-op until new post-cutoff migration added
deploy_simulation.blocked_by_prisma: deploy does NOT block on applied-but-missing; only pending migrations run
deploy_simulation.checksum_mismatches: 28 existing checksum mismatches remain cosmetic; deploy does not re-apply

safe_order: 1. Vercel policy: disable auto migrate deploy (or accept fail-soft risk)
2. Human approval + DB backup + schema diff verify
3. migrate resolve --applied baseline on shared Neon (DDL NOT executed)
4. git archive-promote commit (62 → archive, baseline → active)
5. verify migrate status on shared (applied-but-missing OK, baseline applied)
